title: lichen_l2_iface_init: no return on init failure leaves interface half-initialized
description: In lichen_l2.c:lichen_l2_iface_init() at lines 333-337 and 340-344, if lichen_lora_l2_init() or lichen_lora_l2_get_eui64() fails, the function logs an error and returns early. However, Zephyr's NET_DEVICE_INIT has already registered the net_if and L2 layer. The interface remains registered but non-functional: lichen_iface is NULL, link_ctx is uninitialized, no RX callback is set. Subsequent TX attempts will check lichen_lora_l2_is_running() (false) and fail with -ENETDOWN, but the root cause (init failure) is lost. The net_if reports as 'up' but cannot transmit or receive.
